Device.CfgRegVal_comment: MAX1363 monitor burst: byte0 scan-to-CS for ChannelId 4 (AIN3, 0x07); byte3 monitor tag 0x1f. Script patches 0x01/0x11 template from ChannelId when needed.

Device.NormalMinMax_comment: Written to runtime .../min and .../max by hw-management-bmc-a2d-leakage-config.sh (leakage-handler in-band check: raw*Scale vs min/max).
Device.CfgRegVal_comment: ADS1015 config (reg 0x01): first byte = MUX for ChannelId 4 (AIN3, 0xf2); second byte 0x83 = continuous, DR=1600SPS, COMP_QUE=11 (comparator disabled). Script programs MUX from ChannelId; keep this aligned for documentation. Lo/Hi keys are documentation only while COMP_QUE=11; for ALERT use 0xf2 0x94.
